languages.text: "Осуществить ремонтные таинства и реанимировать сей механизм может лишь служитель Бога-Машины, облеченный высоким саном генетора экстремис, знающий все необходимые ритуалы и сведущий в мистических токах Движущей Силы. Единственное место, где есть шанс найти его — закрытая обитель Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17".

"Only a servant of the Machine God endowed with the high rank of Genetor Extremis, versed in all the necessary rituals, and learned in the mystical currents of the Motive Force, can perform the reparative sacraments and reanimate this mechanism. The only place where one might find such a servant is on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."
languages.original_text: "Осуществить ремонтные таинства и реанимировать сей механизм может лишь служитель Бога-Машины, облеченный высоким саном генетора экстремис, знающий все необходимые ритуалы и сведущий в мистических токах Движущей Силы. Единственное место, где есть шанс найти его — закрытая обитель Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17".

The only place where one might find such a servant is on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

"Only a servant of the Machine God endowed with the high rank of Genetor Extremis, versed in all the necessary rituals, and learned in the mystical currents of the Motive Force, can perform the reparative sacraments and reanimate this mechanism. The only place where one might find such a servant is on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

"Only a servant of the Machine God endowed with the high rank of Genetor Extremis, versed in all the necessary rituals, and learned in the mystical currents of the Motive Force, can perform the reparative sacraments and reanimate this mechanism. The only place where one might find such a servant is on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

languages.text: « Seul un serviteur du Dieu-Machine ayant atteint le rang de genetor extremis, familiarisé avec tous les rituels requis et érudit des courants mystiques de la Force Motrice, pourrait accomplir les sacrements régénérateurs et réanimer ce mécanisme. Le seul endroit où l'on pourrait trouver un tel serviteur se trouve à bord de la station cléricale d'Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. »
languages.original_text: "Only a servant of the Machine God endowed with the high rank of Genetor Extremis, versed in all the necessary rituals, and learned in the mystical currents of the Motive Force, can perform the reparative sacraments and reanimate this mechanism. The only place where one might find such a servant is on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

traits.locale_text: « Seul un serviteur du Dieu-Machine ayant atteint le rang de genetor extremis, familiarisé avec tous les rituels requis et érudit des courants mystiques de la Force Motrice, pourrait accomplir les sacrements régénérateurs et réanimer ce mécanisme. Le seul endroit où l'on pourrait trouver un tel serviteur se trouve à bord de la station cléricale d'Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. »

languages.text: "Nur ein Diener des Maschinengottes mit dem hohen Rang eines Genetor Extremis, der in allen erforderlichen Ritualen versiert und mit den mystischen Strömungen der Antriebskraft vertraut ist, kann die erforderlichen reparativen Sakramente spenden, um diesen Mechanismus zu reanimieren. Der einzige Ort, an dem Ihr einen solchen Diener finden könntet, ist die klösterliche Station Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."
languages.original_text: "Only a servant of the Machine God endowed with the high rank of Genetor Extremis, versed in all the necessary rituals, and learned in the mystical currents of the Motive Force, can perform the reparative sacraments and reanimate this mechanism. The only place where one might find such a servant is on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

traits.locale_text: "Nur ein Diener des Maschinengottes mit dem hohen Rang eines Genetor Extremis, der in allen erforderlichen Ritualen versiert und mit den mystischen Strömungen der Antriebskraft vertraut ist, kann die erforderlichen reparativen Sakramente spenden, um diesen Mechanismus zu reanimieren. Der einzige Ort, an dem Ihr einen solchen Diener finden könntet, ist die klösterliche Station Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

languages.text: “唯有一位被授予特级基因士高阶头衔，精通一切必要仪式，深谙源力神秘流向的万机之神仆从，方能执行修复圣礼，重燃这台机器的生机。要找到这样的仆从，只能去那与世隔绝的星站，卡利西斯祭坛17号。”
languages.original_text: "Only a servant of the Machine God endowed with the high rank of Genetor Extremis, versed in all the necessary rituals, and learned in the mystical currents of the Motive Force, can perform the reparative sacraments and reanimate this mechanism. The only place where one might find such a servant is on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

traits.locale_text: “唯有一位被授予特级基因士高阶头衔，精通一切必要仪式，深谙源力神秘流向的万机之神仆从，方能执行修复圣礼，重燃这台机器的生机。要找到这样的仆从，只能去那与世隔绝的星站，卡利西斯祭坛17号。”

languages.text: «Solo un siervo del Dios Máquina que tenga el elevado rango de genetor extremis, que conozca los rituales adecuados y que comprenda las corrientes místicas de la Fuerza Motriz, puede celebrar los sacramentos reparadores y reanimar el mecanismo. El único lugar donde podría encontrar a tal siervo es en el claustro de la estación Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17».
languages.original_text: "Only a servant of the Machine God endowed with the high rank of Genetor Extremis, versed in all the necessary rituals, and learned in the mystical currents of the Motive Force, can perform the reparative sacraments and reanimate this mechanism. The only place where one might find such a servant is on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

traits.locale_text: «Solo un siervo del Dios Máquina que tenga el elevado rango de genetor extremis, que conozca los rituales adecuados y que comprenda las corrientes místicas de la Fuerza Motriz, puede celebrar los sacramentos reparadores y reanimar el mecanismo. El único lugar donde podría encontrar a tal siervo es en el claustro de la estación Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17».

languages.text: "Sadece Makine Tanrı'nın Genetör Extremis gibi yüksek bir mevkiye sahip, gerekli tüm ayinlere vakıf ve Devinim Gücü'nün mistik akımlarında bilgili bir hizmetkârı, onarım kutsamalarını gerçekleştirip bu mekanizmayı yeniden canlandırabilir. Böyle bir hizmetkârın bulunabileceği tek yer, Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'nin manastır istasyonudur."
languages.original_text: "Only a servant of the Machine God endowed with the high rank of Genetor Extremis, versed in all the necessary rituals, and learned in the mystical currents of the Motive Force, can perform the reparative sacraments and reanimate this mechanism. The only place where one might find such a servant is on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

traits.locale_text: "Sadece Makine Tanrı'nın Genetör Extremis gibi yüksek bir mevkiye sahip, gerekli tüm ayinlere vakıf ve Devinim Gücü'nün mistik akımlarında bilgili bir hizmetkârı, onarım kutsamalarını gerçekleştirip bu mekanizmayı yeniden canlandırabilir. Böyle bir hizmetkârın bulunabileceği tek yer, Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'nin manastır istasyonudur."

languages.text: 「機械神に仕える最高位の神器極の者でなければ、この機械を修復する聖典は行えない。機械神に仕える者は、アルタール・テンプラム・カリシス・エクスト17の閉鎖された駅にしかいない。」
languages.original_text: "Only a servant of the Machine God endowed with the high rank of Genetor Extremis, versed in all the necessary rituals, and learned in the mystical currents of the Motive Force, can perform the reparative sacraments and reanimate this mechanism. The only place where one might find such a servant is on the cloistered station of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17."

traits.locale_text: 「機械神に仕える最高位の神器極の者でなければ、この機械を修復する聖典は行えない。機械神に仕える者は、アルタール・テンプラム・カリシス・エクスト17の閉鎖された駅にしかいない。」
